intro: Tzveleviochloa potaninii, a perennial grass species, is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Tzveleviochloa potaninii include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
